 Material Contained in this Report: 

 I. 
 English translations of 1) the Notice of Convocation of FY 2026 Ordinary General Shareholders&#8217; Meeting,
and 2) the Business Report for the period from April 1, 2025 to March 31, 2026, each as filed by the registrant with the Tokyo Stock Exchange on May 13, 2026. 

 SIGNATURES

the undersigned, thereunto duly authorized.
